scripts.dev:electron: npx esbuild electron/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=electron/dist/main.js --external:electron --external:electron-log --format=esm && npx esbuild electron/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=electron/dist/preload.cjs --external:electron --format=cjs && concurrently --names "FRONTEND,BACKEND,ELECTRON" --prefixColors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:python" "wait-on http://localhost:1420 && electron ."
scripts.build:electron: npm run build && npx esbuild electron/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=electron/dist/main.js --external:electron --external:electron-log --format=esm && npx esbuild electron/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=electron/dist/preload.cjs --external:electron --format=cjs && electron-builder
